article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.7. Attachment 1 - RCMP PSC Report (Aug - Nov 2025) 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to consider Burnaby RCMP Public Safety Report for August–November 2025
briefs.summary: Council will consider a Burnaby RCMP report covering policing activity from August to November 2025, including drug seizures, robbery investigations, traffic enforcement, and community outreach programs across the city.
briefs.action_required: Review the report to understand local crime trends that may affect your business's security planning.
